name: Miso Barbequed Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, whisk together arrowroot and water.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat, then add miso, mirin, plum sauce, and brown sugar.
3. Stir continuously until the sauce thickens, which should take about 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and let cool completely.
5. Slice each eggplant in half lengthwise and trim the ends of the green onions.
6. Wipe shiitake mushrooms with a damp towel to remove dirt.
7. Brush grill with oil to prevent sticking.
8. Cook tofu over medium-hot coals for 7 to 8 minutes on each side until edges start to crisp.
9. While the tofu is cooking, place whole green onions, shiitake mushrooms, and eggplant (cut-side down) on the grill.
10. Continue grilling these items for 5 minutes.
11. Turn the eggplant and baste with miso sauce.
12. Grill for an additional 5 to 8 minutes until the eggplant can be pierced easily with a fork.
13. Serve hot, drizzling any remaining sauce over the top.
